prompt: One of the gap-filling strategies here does not use a column summary at all: it looks at the rows most similar to the incomplete one and borrows their values. Where is that similarity-based filler defined, and where does it actually assemble the completed matrix from the closest matches?

must_surface: the method that produces the filled matrix
rubric.answer_shape: one class, one method producing the completed output

evidence.claim: produces the completed matrix from nearest matches

adjudication.notes: Two independent passes selected the same anchors; no disagreement to resolve.
